# Alternative Video Embedding Options

## Option A: Direct Link (Currently Used)
```markdown
**🎵 [Click here to listen to sample lyre music](public/videos/sample_outputs.mp4)**
```

## Option B: Thumbnail with Play Button
```markdown
[![Sample Output](public/images/video_thumbnail.png)](public/videos/sample_outputs.mp4)
*Click the image above to play sample lyre music generated by our MusicGen_Lyre model*
```

## Option C: Badge-Style Link
```markdown
[![▶️ Play Sample Audio](https://img.shields.io/badge/▶️-Play%20Sample%20Audio-blue?style=for-the-badge)](public/videos/sample_outputs.mp4)
```

## Option D: Host on External Platform
Upload to YouTube, Vimeo, or similar platform and embed with standard markdown:
```markdown
[![Sample Output](https://img.youtube.com/vi/YOUR_VIDEO_ID/0.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YOUR_VIDEO_ID)
```
